title: Plushie Pals
description: A glorified teddy bear mod with some extra features
body:
# **PLUSHIE PALS!**

**Plushie Pals is a simple but cute plushie/teddy bear mod for fabric**

![PLUSHIE PALS!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd1f089fcd9fc96c0f1d3844016954242067a6a8.png)

All the plushes are honkable (some with their own custom sound)

All plushes are mineable with an iron axe and above (don't ask why it's not shears)

For custom plush requests please join the discord or message me directly

For chatting and chilling, why not join the discord or gain access to exclusive private mods on the kofi

Discord = [Support server](https://discord.gabereal.co.uk)

Kofi = [Gabe_Real](https://ko-fi.com/gabe_real)



## **The mod includes the following plushes**


Luxintrus Plush (comes with anchorblade on her back)

Charter Luxintrus Plush (the one with white hair)

Noxintrus Plush

Technoblade Plush

Diansu Plush

Fundy Plush

Ducky Plush

Mouthpiece Plush

Mando Plush

Alien Plush

Ympe Plush

Clownpierce Plush

Wazou 2.0 Plush

Augur Plush

Moriya Plush

Inkling Plush

Winsweep Plush

EightSidedSquare Plush

Amy Plush (AmyMialee)


## Plans for the future

Add more plushes

Maybe turn the mod into a Christmas decor mod

Possibly add an animation to the plush honk

Allow the plushes to hold items or display them on their back

Add Santa - Idk why but I figured it might be a Christmas mod? You never know...


## Commonly asked questions

Will there be a forge port? No. Unless I all of a sudden get possesed by the forge community (not likely to happen)

Can I port the mod to forge? Yes feel free just make sure to link the original mod and contact me or a member about porting!

Will you make more mods like this? I'm not sure - I do want to make more mods but maybe a bit different to this one. It depends really, if the mod is popular and gets me a following then yes I will (just remember this is my first mod so I'm not expecting it to blow up lol)

Bedrock? No.

Update to newer versions? Possibly im not sure, as of right now I am working with Java 17 instead of the newer versions such as 1.21 which is Java 21 - really I mod for whatever version I play on - which right now is 1.19.2 but I will possibly update to versions such as 1.20.1

Will you become famous? I hope

Can I add this to my modpack? Yes 

## Custom plushies

If you want a custom plushie please take a quick look at the kofi commissions page, you can find all the details there, it also helps me keep making these mods!

[Custom plush commissions](https://ko-fi.com/gabe_real/commissions)

## Updates

(19th December 2024) - Versions 1.0.0/1.1.0 are still in beta form, any issues found please report in my discord or email me: mandojango1846@hotmail.com 

Quilt 1.19.2 version should be out in a week or two 

1.20.1 version for fabric and quilt should be out late January

(19th December 2024) - Removed all of the copied textures such as the rat maid plush e.c.t, dont worry though as we are working on some of our own versions 

(9th January 2025) - Changed the voxel shape/hitbox of the plushies to match the general shape of them, ddded some new plushies and reworked some others. Now starting to work on the 1.20.1 version :)

(11th January 2025) - Updated mod to 1.20.1! YIPEE and changed some plushes names
